name: deep-cuts-discovery-platform
description: Reusable one-page artist discovery and support platform.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-platform.mjs && node scripts/test-discovery.mjs && node scripts/test-analytics.mjs && node scripts/test-build-tracking.mjs && node --check js/app.js && node --check js/analytics.js && node --check js/interactions.js && node --check js/reporting.js && node --check js/report.js
